gpu: X.Org AMD BARTS PRO [Radeon HD 6850] (DRM 2.50.0 / 4.15.0-44-generic, LLVM 7.0.0)
notes: Run "WINEPREFIX=/YourSteamLocation/steam/steamapps/compatdata/220440/pfx/ winetricks dotnet40" twice. A popup that a runtime cant be found may come up but it happened to me at the first start of the game. After that it starts and runs with no complaints.
title: DmC: Devil May Cry

notes: I installed the protontricks AUR package and ran the command twice that several other users recommend. It generated some DirectX related errors on first run, but started anyway.  Runs locked at 60 FPS with no issues on high settings, even on my outdated drivers.
title: DmC: Devil May Cry

notes: Runs perfectly after following instructions from here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nEJ5JDgVL48
title: DmC: Devil May Cry

notes: Game fails to start. dotnet 40 is installed in the wine prefix for the game. Without having to manually add it (trying to redo it with even the --force switch leads to winetricks ignoring the command)
title: DmC: Devil May Cry

notes:
After installing game it failed to start on hitting play. From the terminal had to run the following commands :
"WINEPREFIX=/<your steam library location>/steamapps/compatdata/220440/pfx/ winetricks dotnet40" to install .NET4.0 (hit cancel to not install Mono, though I might already have installed it previously!) then had to repair the install by running "WINEPREFIX=/<your steam library location>/steamapps/compatdata/220440/pfx/ winetricks --force dotnet40" again with the --force switch. Now when hitting play in Steam I saw two error messages which I 'ok'ed. Game started up ok and I played through the first mission and beat the level boss.
title: DmC: Devil May Cry

notes: Installed dotnet40 once (protontricks 220440 dotnet40). It works perfectly!

title: DmC: Devil May Cry

notes: Game launches after installing dotnet40 with winetricks bust crashes to desktop if input is registered from a controller.
title: DmC: Devil May Cry

notes: Game would fail to run. When running winetricks dotnet40 on the pfx I kept running into the issue that it was believed to be installed already, this appears to be done through first run of steam but probably with some uncaught error. I deleted the prefix then ran the command WINEPREFIX=<PATH TO PFX (that I deleted)> winetricks dotnet40, pressed play in library, steam did its initial 5 steps again. Couple of error msges about DX9 but the game ran smoothly nonetheless. Killed first boss without encountering issues.
title: DmC: Devil May Cry

notes:
The game didn't launch initially. I had to use Protontricks to get it work (Thanks to this video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4ca0vTmu21U).
Now I can play the game smoothly without any issue.
title: DmC: Devil May Cry

notes:
Installed dotnet40 using winetricks, followed a similar process than described here: https://github.com/redmcg/wine/wiki

Was able to complete Bloody Palace and training with Vergil without any issue.
title: DmC: Devil May Cry
